en: You do realise, of course, we can't keep up you-know-who indefinitely.
ko: 물론, 당신이 깨닫는다면, 우리는 그를 무한정 막을 수는 없어요.

en: That doesn't mean we can't delay him.
ko: 그렇다고 그를 지연시킬 수 없는 건 아니에요.

en: So yes, you might as well use it. He's going to try to kill you either way.
ko: 어차피 그는 당신을 죽이려고 할 거예요.

en: Hogwarts is threatened! Men the Boundaries protect us! Do your duty to our school!
I've always wanted to use that spell.
